data.title: Trump's Tax Cut Could Add $4.6 Trillion To Deficit, With $48 Billion Tax Relief For Top 100 Firms: Robert Reich
data.description: Robert Reich has termed Donald Trump's taxation policies as an "absolutely shameless giveaway," that could shoot up deficit to $4.6 trillion.

data.title: Tesla Bull Advises EV Giant Investors To Limit Emotion Tied To The Product: 'I Love Starbucks But I Wouldn't Own SBUX Stock'
data.description: Fund manager Gary Black on Monday advised Tesla investors to "limit the emotion" tied to the product and look at the stock analytically.

data.title: GOP Megadonor Ken Griffin's Citadel Scores 77% Return On Palantir Despite Trimming Stake, Doubles Down On These 4 'Mag 7' Stocks
data.description: Ken Griffin's Citadel Advisors slashed stake in S&P 500's top-performing stock of 2024, but its position still grew 77% in value during Q4.

data.title: Apple's iPhone SE 4 To Feature TSMC's In-House 5G Modem, But It May Lag Behind Qualcomm's Snapdragon X75
data.description: Apple is set to introduce its first in-house 5G modem, built by TSMC, in the iPhone SE 4, but reports suggest it may lack mmWave 5G support.

data.title: Elon Musk Sparks Debate On Social Security Data After Report Finds Millions Of Alive Centenarians In America
data.description: Elon Musk sparked a discussion about Social Security SSA data accuracy, saying millions of Americans over 100 years old are listed as alive.
